name: Brown Sugar Hot Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the chocolate and water in a medium saucepan over low heat until the chocolate has melted (the mixture will thicken).
2. Gradually whisk in the milk, then add the sugar and salt until evenly blended.
To serve:
1. Reheat in a saucepan over medium-low heat or in the microwave, stirring occasionally.
2. Serve with peppermint cane for garnish.
